name: Bhai Chattar Singh
body: If there was one thing that I have heard from everyone who knew Bhai Chattar Singh Ji, it was about the saintly qualities he possessed, demonstrated in the way he led his life. Blessed with a melodious voice and deep understanding of Gurbani, he would always know how to combine these two elements to take everyone on a meditative journey. Just to give an idea of his life, I’d like to share an incident narrated to me by Bhai Sarwan Singh Ji who accompanied Bhai Chattar Singh Ji on tabla for approximately 30 years. One evening, while performing Kirtan in Leeds, a few members of the Sangat who were great admirers of Bhai Sahib’s Kirtan approached him after the program and insisted on gifting him a gold chain. He accepted the gift that night, but the next morning he went into the Darbar Sahib and placed the chain in front of Guruji and prayed that it got into the hands of someone in need. When his ‘saathis’ asked why did he accept it in the first place, Bhai Chattar Singh Ji said that the Sangat gave it with love and respect. He did not want to offend them by refusing, but he could not keep it either. He said that he does Kirtan for the love of Guruji and it would not be right if he had kept it. Another incident that was also narrated by Bhai Sarwan Singh Ji took place before a Kirtan program. They had arrived very early for the program and Bhai Chattar Singh Ji requested to perform the ‘Sewa’ of washing the Gurdwara toilets and they proceeded with this ‘Sewa’ before their Kirtan. Such was the humble life that Bhai Chattar Singh Ji led and inspired many others to follow as well. If anyone has more recordings of Bhai Chattar Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
